import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Zrušit žádost"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/financing/v3/applications/{applicationId}/cancel"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Partneři používají zdroj `/financing/v3/applications/{applicationId}/cancel`, kde `{applicationId}` je ID *aplikace* obdržené v odpovědi `/financing/v3/applications` po jejím vytvoření.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"applicationId","in":"path","description":"","required":true,"example":"123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426655440000","schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"reason":{"type":"string","enum":["APPLICATION_CANCELLED_CARRIER_CHANGED","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_CART_CONTENT_CHANGED","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_BY_CUSTOMER","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_BY_ERP","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_EXPIRED","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_UNFINISHED","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_BY_ESHOP_RULES","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_OTHER"],"description":"Důvod zrušení. Pokud není nastaveno, považuje se za   APPLICATION_CANCELLED_OTHER."},"customReason":{"type":"string","description":"Specifikace důvodu APPLICATION_CANCELLED_OTHER"}},"example":{"reason":"APPLICATION_CANCELLED_CARRIER_CHANGED"}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","headers":{}},"422":{"description":"Změna stavu nemůže být zpracována","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"errors":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"Jedinečný interní kód chyby"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Popis chyby srozumitelný pro člověka (nelokalizovaný)"},"severity":{"type":"string","enum":["ERROR","WARN","INFO"]},"attribute":{"type":"string","description":"JSON cesta atributu požadavku, který způsobil chybu (pokud je to relevantní)"},"ticketId":{"type":"string","description":"Interní ID tiketu, používané pro zpětné sledování chyb"}},"required":["code","message","severity"]},"description":"Pole s chybami"}},"required":["errors"]},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"errors":[{"code":"BAD_REQUEST","message":"Bad request","severity":"ERROR","attribute":"customer.addresses[1].streetNumber","ticketId":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4"}]}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
